dashboard.metaDescription: A complete modern JavaScript course for beginners and experienced developers.
dashboard.headline: JavaScript Masterclass
dashboard.subtitle: Start your journey toward professional programming

m01.title: Core Concepts
m01.desc: Advanced data types and memory management foundations.

m02.title: JS Fundamentals
m02.desc: Variables, data types, operators, and browser interaction.

m03.title: Conditions & Logic
m03.desc: Comparison operators, if/else, switch, and logical expressions.

m04.title: Loops & Switch
m04.desc: While, for, do-while loops and basics of lexical environment.

m05.title: Functions
m05.desc: Function declarations, expressions, arrow functions, IIFE, and scope.

m06.title: Strings
m06.desc: Primitives, immutability, String Pool, and memory optimization.

m07.title: Objects
m07.desc: Objects, references, methods, and memory structure.

m09.title: Array Methods
m09.desc: Mutating and non-mutating methods with visualizer.

m10.title: Code Parsing
m10.desc: How JavaScript parses and executes your code (Parsing & Hoisting).

m11.title: Closures
m11.desc: Variable scope, lexical environment, and practical closures.

m12.title: Prototypes
m12.desc: Prototype inheritance and ES5 OOP fundamentals.

m13.title: ES6 Classes
m13.desc: Modern OOP in JavaScript and class syntax.

m14.title: Garbage Collector
m14.desc: How JavaScript manages and cleans up memory.

m15.title: Event Loop
m15.desc: Macrotasks, microtasks, and asynchronous execution order.

m16.title: Promises
m16.desc: Asynchronous control flow, promise states, and chaining.

m17.title: Async / Await
m17.desc: Modern approach to asynchronous code and real-world usage.

error404.heading: Page not found
error404.body: The link you are trying to open does not exist or has been moved.
